from docx import Document
doc = Document\(r'c:\\Users\\tomas\\Desktop\\Claude Cowork\\CLAUDE OUTPUTS\\Controla-Estrategia\\Controla_PRD-Landing_v1.docx'\)
for p in doc.paragraphs:
    print\(p.text\)
print\('=== TABLES ==='\)
for table in doc.tables:
    for row in table.rows:
        cells = [cell.text for cell in row.cells]
        print\(' | '.join\(cells\)\)
    print\('---'\)

import json, os

additions = {
    'es': {'backToBlog': 'Volver al blog', 'backToHome': 'Volver al inicio', 'ctaTitle': '¿Querés ver cómo funciona en tu hotel?', 'ctaButton': 'Agendar una llamada'},
    'en': {'backToBlog': 'Back to blog', 'backToHome': 'Back to home', 'ctaTitle': 'Want to see how it works for your hotel?', 'ctaButton': 'Book a call'},
    'ca': {'backToBlog': 'Tornar al blog', 'backToHome': 'Tornar a l\\'inici', 'ctaTitle': 'Vols veure com funciona al teu hotel?', 'ctaButton': 'Agenda una trucada'},
    'fr': {'backToBlog': 'Retour au blog', 'backToHome': 'Retour à l\\'accueil', 'ctaTitle': 'Vous voulez voir comment ça marche pour votre hôtel ?', 'ctaButton': 'Réserver un appel'},
    'de': {'backToBlog': 'Zurück zum Blog', 'backToHome': 'Zurück zur Startseite', 'ctaTitle': 'Möchten Sie sehen, wie es für Ihr Hotel funktioniert?', 'ctaButton': 'Gespräch vereinbaren'},
    'it': {'backToBlog': 'Torna al blog', 'backToHome': 'Torna alla home', 'ctaTitle': 'Vuoi vedere come funziona per il tuo hotel?', 'ctaButton': 'Prenota una chiamata'},
    'pt': {'backToBlog': 'Voltar ao blog', 'backToHome': 'Voltar ao início', 'ctaTitle': 'Quer ver como funciona no seu hotel?', 'ctaButton': 'Agendar uma chamada'},
}

for locale, keys in additions.items\(\):
    path = f'messages/{locale}.json'
    with open\(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        data = json.load\(f\)
    data['blog'].update\(keys\)
    with open\(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        json.dump\(data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)
    print\(f'Updated {path}'\)
" 2>&1)
